debug_info.goal:
α : Type
inst✝ : LinearOrder α
l : List α
x : α
⊢ List.count x l = List.count x (quickSort α inst✝ l)

failed_attempts:
induction l using quickSort.induct with
  | nil => simp
  | cons pivot l ih₁ ih₂ =>
    simp [ih₁, ih₂, count_sum_above_below_pivot]
    ac_rfl

induction l using quickSort.induct with
  | nil => simp
  | cons pivot l ih1 ih2 =>
    simp [count_sum_above_below_pivot, ih1, ih2]

match l with
  | [] => simp
  | pivot :: l =>
    simp [count_sum_above_below_pivot pivot l x, count_eq_count_quickSort (smaller pivot l) x, count_eq_count_quickSort (larger pivot l) x]
    omega
termination_by l.length

induction l using quickSort.induct with
  | case1 => grind
  | case2 pivot l ih₁ ih₂ => grind [ih₁, ih₂]

induction l using quickSort.induct with
  | nil => simp
  | cons pivot l ih1 ih2 =>
    simp [ih1, ih2, count_sum_above_below_pivot]

induction l using quickSort.induct with
  | nil => simp
  | cons pivot l ih₁ ih₂ =>
    simp [ih₁, ih₂, count_sum_above_below_pivot, add_comm, add_left_comm]

induction l using quickSort.induct with
  | case1 => simp
  | case2 pivot t ih1 ih2 =>
    simp [ih1, ih2, count_sum_above_below_pivot, List.count_append, List.count_cons]
    split_ifs <;> ac_rfl
induction l using quickSort.induct <;> simp [*, count_sum_above_below_pivot]

induction l using quickSort.induct with
  | case1 => simp
  | case2 pivot l ih1 ih2 =>
    simp [ih1, ih2, count_sum_above_below_pivot, add_comm, add_left_comm]
successful_attempts:
cases l with
  | nil => simp
  | cons pivot l =>
    have : (smaller pivot l).length < (pivot :: l).length := by
      grind
    have : (larger pivot l).length < (pivot :: l).length := by
      grind
    have ih₁ := count_eq_count_quickSort (smaller pivot l)
    have ih₂ := count_eq_count_quickSort (larger pivot l)
    grind
termination_by l.length

cases l with
  | nil => simp
  | cons pivot l =>
    have : (smaller pivot l).length < (pivot :: l).length := by
      grind
    have : (larger pivot l).length < (pivot :: l).length := by
      grind
    have ih₁ := count_eq_count_quickSort (smaller pivot l)
    have ih₂ := count_eq_count_quickSort (larger pivot l)
    grind
termination_by l.length

cases l with
  | nil => simp
  | cons pivot l =>
    have : (smaller pivot l).length < (pivot :: l).length := by
      grind
    have : (larger pivot l).length < (pivot :: l).length := by
      grind
    have ih₁ := count_eq_count_quickSort (smaller pivot l)
    have ih₂ := count_eq_count_quickSort (larger pivot l)
    grind
termination_by l.length

cases l with
  | nil => simp
  | cons pivot l =>
    have : (smaller pivot l).length < (pivot :: l).length := by
      grind
    have : (larger pivot l).length < (pivot :: l).length := by
      grind
    have ih₁ := count_eq_count_quickSort (smaller pivot l)
    have ih₂ := count_eq_count_quickSort (larger pivot l)
    grind
termination_by l.length
